scenario.title: Late Night Argument
scenario.description: A couple argues about one partner coming home late without notice.

traits.background: values punctuality and communication
socially active, dislikes being controlled

scenario.title: Performance Review Disappointment
scenario.description: A manager gives a negative performance review to an employee who expected praise.

traits.background: demands high standards, little empathy
worked hard and expected recognition

scenario.title: Friend Cancels at Last Minute
scenario.description: Two friends had plans for a movie night; one cancels due to a spontaneous date.

traits.style: hurt but tries to be understanding
traits.background: values loyalty and reliability
impulsive, prioritizes new experiences

scenario.title: Neighbor Complains About Noise
scenario.description: A resident is confronted by a neighbor about loud music late at night.

traits.background: needs quiet for work, has low tolerance
enjoys social gatherings, forgets neighbors

scenario.title: Roommate Leaves Mess
scenario.description: A tidy roommate confronts a messy roommate about unwashed dishes.

traits.background: raised in a clean household, needs order
procrastinates cleaning, avoids conflict

scenario.title: Sibling Inheritance Dispute
scenario.description: Two siblings argue over how to divide a parent's heirloom.
scenario.emotion_arc_hint: greed disguised as fairness → bitter accusations → cutoff

traits.background: feels they contributed more to caregiving
wanted emotional keepsake, not money

scenario.title: Team Member Takes Credit
scenario.description: A junior colleague confronts a senior who presented their idea as their own.

traits.background: believes in climbing the ladder by any means
has always played by the rules, now feels betrayed

scenario.title: Parent Disapproves of Career Choice
scenario.description: A young adult tells their traditional parent they want to become an artist.

traits.background: believes financial security is paramount
has supportive friends, but fears family rejection

scenario.title: Ex-Partners Meet by Chance
scenario.description: Two ex-partners run into each other at a cafe, leading to an awkward exchange.

traits.background: moved on quickly, regrets nothing
still healing, feels vulnerable

scenario.title: Mentor Criticizes Protégé
scenario.description: A mentor harshly criticizes a protégé's project draft in front of peers.
scenario.emotion_arc_hint: pride → humiliation → determination to prove wrong

traits.background: believes tough love builds character
admires mentor but is easily discouraged

scenario.title: Apology After Betrayal
scenario.description: A partner confesses to having broken a promise, leading to a tense confrontation at home.

traits.background: values trust and honesty in relationships
impulsive but deeply regrets the mistake

scenario.title: Neighbor Noise Complaint
scenario.description: A resident confronts a neighbor about loud music late at night.

traits.background: needs quiet for early work schedule
hosts gatherings often, unaware of disturbance

scenario.title: Doctor's Difficult Diagnosis
scenario.description: A physician must inform a patient about a serious, life-altering condition.
scenario.emotion_arc_hint: professional composure → patient shock → shared grief

traits.background: experienced oncologist, used to delivering bad news
otherwise healthy, family history of illness

scenario.title: Teenager Caught Sneaking Out
scenario.description: A parent discovers their teen returning very late and demands an explanation.

traits.background: anxious about safety, strict household rules
feels constrained, wants independence

scenario.title: Colleagues Clash on Project Direction
scenario.description: Two team members disagree on how to approach a critical deadline.
scenario.emotion_arc_hint: polite disagreement → heated debate → forced collaboration

traits.background: prefers tried-and-tested methods, risk-averse
advocates for modern, agile approach

scenario.title: Friend's Wedding Toast Goes Wrong
scenario.description: A best friend gives an emotional toast that unintentionally reveals a secret.

traits.background: loves public speaking but sometimes overshares
values privacy, the secret could cause family drama

scenario.title: Landlord vs. Tenant over Rent Increase
scenario.description: A tenant receives an unexpected rent hike and confronts the landlord.

traits.background: owns multiple properties, focused on profit
struggling financially, has rented for years

scenario.title: Teacher Accused of Favoritism
scenario.description: A student complains to a teacher about unequal treatment in grading.

traits.background: experienced, prides herself on fairness
feels overlooked, works hard but gets lower marks

scenario.title: Stranger in an Elevator Panic
scenario.description: Two strangers are stuck in an elevator; one has severe claustrophobia.
scenario.emotion_arc_hint: initial calm → rising anxiety → mutual support

traits.background: former first responder, trained in crisis
has panic disorder triggered by enclosed spaces

scenario.title: Car Accident Blame Game
scenario.description: Two drivers involved in a minor fender bender argue over fault.
scenario.emotion_arc_hint: shock → anger → reluctant acceptance of shared fault

traits.background: short temper, often in a hurry
cautious driver, has dashcam evidence
